en: A: Who is he?

ab: Swai na tama mu ka heya.
en: He is my uncle.

ab: Ga meepah maanu ka swai bubu su?
ch: A:你的舅舅從事什麼工作?
en: A: What does your uncle do for a living?
B: He’s a cop.
A: Who is that guy?
B: She’s my sister.

ab: Niqan qpahur na qbsuran mqedil su?
en: A: Does your sister have a job?

ab: Gaga meepah sapah ising ka heya.
en: B: She works in a hospital.

ch: A:他們兩個人是兄弟姐妹嗎?
en: A: Are they brothers and sisters?
B: No, they are friends.
A: Are you Aboriginal?
B: Yes, I am an Sederik.

ab: Ye seediq tmpusu ka qedil su?
en: A: Is your spouse Aboriginal?
B: Yes, but she’s from the Paiwan tribe.
A: Is your father very tall?
B: Yes, we are all very tall.

ab: Ye wada muuyas sapah pyasan ka swai su mqedil?
en: A: Does your sister go to school?

ab: Un, wada musa muuyas sapah pyasan di.
en: B: Yes, she went to school.

ab: Ye mkela rmengo kari seediq ka angu su?
en: A: Do your siblings speak the language?

ab: Un, mkela rmengo kari seediq ka dheya.
en: B: Yes, they speak the ethnic language.

ab: Piya kana mtswai su ka isu?
en: A: How many brothers and sisters do you have?

ab: Teru kana mtswai mu ka yaku.
en: B: I have three brothers and sisters.

ab: Ye su gaga msuupu tama bubu meniq sapah.
ch: A:你和爸爸媽媽一起住嗎?
en: A: Do you live with your parents?

ab: Un, msuupu ku tama bubu mu meniq sapah.
ch: B:是，我和爸爸媽媽一起住。
en: B: Yes, I live with my mom and dad.

ab: Ye su gaga msuupu meniq tama rudan ma bubu rudan?
ch: A:你和爺爺奶奶一起住嗎?
en: A: Do you live with your grandparents?

ab: Ini, ini ku psuupu dheya meniq sapah.
ch: B:不，我沒和跟他們一起住。
en: B: No, I didn’t live with them.

ab: Ima ga su spuun meniq sapah?
en: A: Who do you live with?

ab: Msuupu ku tama bubu ma qbsurn mu meniq sapah.
ch: B:我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥住在一起。
en: B: I live with my father, mother and brother.
A: Where are you from?
B: I’m from Karenko.
A: Where is your home?
B: Our home is in Karenko.
A:Where is your hometown?
B: My hometown is in Paran.
A: Where is your tribe?
B: Our tribe is in paran.

ab: Maha su knuwan ka alang su?
ch: A:你什麼時候會回去部落?
en: A: When are you going back to the tribe?

ab: Msange rbagan de mosa ku alang klaali.
en: B: I will go back in the summer.
B: I’m a Sydnek child.
